insights.title: Peak Productivity Window Detected
insights.summary: You complete 73% of your deep work tasks between 2 PM and 6 PM on weekdays. Consider protecting this window from meetings.

evidence.description: Task completion timestamps analyzed over 28 days

recommendations.action: Block 2pm-6pm daily on Google Calendar as Focus Time
Decline non-urgent meetings that overlap with focus window

insights.title: Subscription Spending 34% Above Budget
insights.summary: Your subscription services total $312/month, 34% above your $232 budget. Three services show minimal usage: two streaming platforms and a gym app.

evidence.description: Recurring charges from connected bank account
Cross-referenced with Spotify and calendar activity logs

recommendations.action: Review GymApp Pro ($9.99/mo) — last used 62 days ago

insights.title: Sleep Consistency Correlated With Task Performance
insights.summary: On days you sleep 7+ hours, you complete 2.3x more tasks and rate your mood 40% higher. Your average sleep this month is 6.2 hours.

evidence.description: Inferred from calendar end-of-day and morning event times
Tasks completed per day vs. inferred sleep duration

recommendations.action: Set a 10pm phone notification as your wind-down reminder

insights.title: System Design Skills Lagging Behind Career Goal
insights.summary: Your "Accelerate Career Growth" goal requires system design expertise, but your calendar shows no dedicated learning time in the past 3 weeks. Peers at your level average 3 hours/week.

evidence.description: Knowledge graph gap between current skills and goal requirements
Learning time blocks in past 21 days

recommendations.action: Schedule 90-min "System Design" block every Tuesday morning
Complete "Designing Data-Intensive Applications" chapter 5-7 this week

insights.title: Important Relationship Slipping
insights.summary: You haven't interacted with your close contact "Marcus Williams" in 47 days. You typically connect every 2 weeks.

evidence.description: Shared calendar events and Gmail thread history

recommendations.action: Send Marcus a quick message this week
recommendations.draft_message: Hey Marcus! It's been a while — how are things going? Would love to catch up over coffee soon.
